modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about financial hold on student account

full_description_text: So, like, I was just checking my account and I noticed this weird financial hold thingy on it. I mean, I don’t even know why it’s there! I thought everything was fine with my financial aid, but now I can’t do anything. It’s super frustrating because I really need to sort this out, but I have no clue what’s going on!
